message:
fix(test): remove unused PROJECT_ROOT variable

Removes the unused PROJECT_ROOT variable from the test script to
resolve shellcheck warning SC2034. The variable was defined but
never referenced in the test logic.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,6 @@
 set -euo pipefail
 
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
-PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/.." && pwd)"
 INSTALL_SCRIPT="${SCRIPT_DIR}/install.sh"
 
 # shellcheck disable=SC1090
